git-cleanup.description: Branch and repo cleanup -- keep the repo lean

commands.cmd: git branch --merged main | grep -v 'main\|master\|\*' | xargs -r git branch -d
commands.comment: delete local branches already merged to main
preview stale remote-tracking branches (remove --dry-run to prune)
local branches whose remote was deleted -- safe to remove
aggressive gc -- reclaims space from rewritten history
forgotten stashes -- review before they become mysteries
visual branch topology -- understand what needs merging
